arts.sum: Earlier in the season, Barcelona were seriously lacking midfield options. At one stage, Hansi Flick only had Marc Casado and Pedri for the pivot positions in his system, as he was without the services of Frenkie de Jong, Gavi and Marc Bernal because of injury. The 28-year-old German international is an attractive prospect because of his contract situation. arts.ttl: Celtic offer update on Barca loanee Alex Valle’s future
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has rejected claims that Barcelona could try to recall Alex Valle from his season-long loan in the January transfer window. Valle is enjoying life at Celtic after moving in the summer, and Rodgers says he does not want him to go anywhere.
